title: Outline compatibility Images area of concern
body:
* podman/domain/images.py has docstrings for all methods on Image,
  ImageManager, and RegistryData.
* podman/tests/unit/test_images.py has tests for Image properties and
  ImageManager list() and get().
* Added requests-mock to testing requirements
* Added requests and toml to project requirements
* Updated pyproject.toml to include target python version of 3.6
* Pylint run on all new code

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>
